governing_requirement: Publish only actually installed and independently qualified routes with exact artifact, runtime, hardware, benchmark, certificate, lifecycle, freshness, champion/challenger and rollback authority while keeping partial libraries honest and preventing self-promotion.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-10.02 remains dependency and implementation blocked. Its strict frozen declaration and semantic guards receive partial credit, but no authoritative qualification/publication decision exists.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping and additive implementation packet. Fresh probes reproduced every trusted gap, and all governing source hashes remain exact.

verified_foundations: The frozen capability snapshot is strict and canonically top-level hashed with a fixture/runtime evidence firewall, typed access modes/endpoints, labels, artifacts, transforms, limits and conditional native_venv/container runtime shape.
Provider declarations carry model, workflow, runtime, hardware, route, performance, champion, qualification, lifecycle and certificate identities.

Validation enforces unique stack/hash/route IDs, promoted-route certificate presence and declared expiry, inactive-certificate removal, mode eligibility, route/lifecycle/health consistency, availability freshness and live endpoint advertisement.
A partial provider list remains structurally valid, so absent downloads need not be fabricated as eligible placeholders.
Three focused positive/adoption/fixture-firewall tests pass and Ruff reports no issues.

direct_probes.mutation: Change the model artifact SHA-256, retain stack_sha256, and recompute only snapshot_sha256.
Replace certificate_ids with an invented nonempty ID and recompute snapshot_sha256.
Change performance_profile.observed_at to 2000-01-01 and recompute snapshot_sha256.
Replace champion ID/hash with invented values and recompute snapshot_sha256.

confirmed_gaps: No resolver proves model/workflow/runtime/hardware/route identities against installed cataloged bytes or recomputes stack_sha256.
Benchmark certificate IDs/hashes are not resolved to trusted signed, current, unrevoked, exact-route/label/context/artifact/person/dimension evidence.
Performance observations lack a freshness ceiling, independent source/correlation identity and append-only contextual ledger head.
Champion identity is declarative; no unique-route arbitration, prior champion, atomic promotion transaction or tested rollback binding is resolved.
No executable lifecycle rule forces newly installed/self-reported providers to enter only as draft/challenger and prevents direct promotion.
No additive publication decision derives availability and eligibility from actual bytes, certificates, current health, ledger evidence and closed reason codes.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five additive paths remain absent and clean. Frozen v1 and candidate files are read-only; validation.py remains in the preserved MF-P6-08.05 dirty scope.
implementation_packet.model_library_boundary: Do not ingest or activate the deferred 7,282-record model library until Kevin explicitly confirms downloads are complete. A partial installed library remains an honest valid input.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-10.01 is implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits the strict declaration shape, structural lifecycle/health checks and honest partial-library representation only. It does not qualify or promote any provider, resolve installed bytes or certificates, publish a release/capability decision, activate deferred downloads, or complete MF-P6-10.02.
